Engineer Job Sheet

Carbon book template · scan into NeXa Engineer after completion
Office copy Engineer copy Customer copy where required
Job ref
Cost centre
Date
Engineer
Quote / PO ref
Sheet no.
Photo/scan this full page into NeXa Engineer before leaving site
1. Customer / Site AI fields: client, address, contact, job description
2. Time Sheet AI fields: scheduled time, actual time, break, travel, variance
Scheduled start Scheduled finish Actual arrival Actual start Actual finish Break mins Travel mins Actual labour hrs
Time same as schedule
Time under schedule
Time over schedule
3. Van Consumables Used Tick van stock used. Office prices and charges against the job.
PTFE / jointing tape
Sealant / silicone
Solder / flux
Pipe clips / brackets
Screws / plugs
Cable ties / fixings
Copper fittings
Plastic fittings
Compression fittings
Waste fittings
Pipe insulation
Inhibitor / cleaner
4. Equipment Book Out / Book In AI fields: equipmentOut, equipmentIn, condition
Equipment / plant Booked out qty Out condition Booked in qty In condition Initials
5. Parts / Materials Used Non-van-stock items or chargeable parts needing office review
Item / description Qty Supplier / van stock PO required? Cost centre
Yes No
Yes No
Yes No
6. Variations / Extra Works Use before doing unquoted works where client approval is required.
No variation
Variation required
Office contacted before proceeding
Customer approval required
Customer approved on site
Quote required before works
7. Outcome / Office Review AI fields: outcome, notes, defects, rebook reason
Complete
Needs parts
Needs rebooked
Could not access
Office review required
Ready to invoice
Engineer notes / service report / defects / rebook reason
Printer note: suitable for A4 duplicate/triplicate carbonless books. Keep boxes and labels dark for OCR. Suggested paper sequence: white office copy, yellow engineer copy, pink customer copy.
Errol Watson Group · Engineer carbon book template · NeXa scan-ready v1 For office use: scan into job, review extracted actuals, approve time/equipment/materials
